headline: Forget MicroStrategy. The Company Taking a Cut Every Time Bitcoin Traders Panic Is Up 7% This Year and Pays a $5 Dividend
summary: MicroStrategy (NASDAQ:MSTR), now operating as Strategy, is once again the loudest ticker in the room, riding a 55.97% one-month rally and a 12.79% weekly pop on the back of yet another bitcoin treasury announcement. But here is what you should actually be watching. Strip away the bitcoin accounting and there is barely a company underneath. ... Forget MicroStrategy. The Company Taking a Cut Every Time Bitcoin Traders Panic Is Up 7% This Year and Pays a $5 Dividend

headline: CME Group Enters AI Compute Futures As Valuation Looks Stretched
summary: CME Group, in partnership with Silicon Data, plans to launch what it calls the world's first futures market for computing power. The new contracts aim to standardize pricing and risk management for AI compute resources in a rapidly expanding market. This move extends CME Group's reach beyond traditional futures tied to financial assets and commodities into AI focused infrastructure. CME Group (NasdaqGS:CME), trading at $297.13, is a major exchange operator with futures across interest...
